channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The ‘Worst in Show’ CES products put your data at risk and cause waste, privacy advocates say
item.description: So much of the technology showcased at CES includes gadgets made to improve consumers’ lives — whether by leveraging AI to make devices that help people become more efficient, by creating companions to cure loneliness or by providing tools that help people with mental and physical health.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Parvini, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Meta's Shift in Content Moderation
item.description: Meta loosens rules around hate speech and abuse, sparking concerns from advocates for vulnerable groups.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Japan Links 200+ Cyberattacks to Chinese Hacking Group | AP News
item.description: Japan's National Police Agency links over 200 cyberattacks targeting the country's national security and high technology data to a Chinese hacking group, MirrorFace.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: ByteDance's Lemon8 gains traction amid TikTok ban threat as creators push the app
item.description: Hearing a lot about Lemon8 lately? You’re not the only one. Amid a looming U.S. ban on TikTok, content creators have been pushing the platform's sister app.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Top tech stealing the show at CES 2025
item.description: Big tech coming in 2025 includes solar umbrellas, AI TVs, smart earbuds and crazy robots. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson gives his take on the wonders revealed at CES 2025.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Intro to Ktor: The HTTP server for Kotlin
item.description: Kotlin is a modern general-purpose language that brings together object-oriented and functional programming power in a sleek syntax. Ktor is the official HTTP server for Kotlin, leveraging Kotlin’s expressiveness for building endpoints and other server-side necessities.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Meta eliminates fact-checking in latest bow to Trump
item.description: Meta chief executive officer Mark Zuckerberg on Tuesday announced changes to content moderation on Facebook and Instagram long sought by conservatives. Incoming President Donald Trump said the new approach was “probably” due to threats he made against the technology mogul.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, BARBARA ORTUTAY and NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang says he’d be delighted to meet and congratulate Donald Trump
item.description: As head of the world’s most valuable chipmaker, Huang has an opportunity to help steer the administration’s AI policy at a moment of rapid change
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Fubo combining with Disney's Hulu + Live TV; lawsuit against Venu Sports settled
item.description: Disney's Hulu + Live TV and sports streaming service Fubo are combining in a deal that will also see the settlement of a lawsuit against the creation of Venu Sports.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: WordPress.org statement threatens possible shutdown for all of 2025
item.description: Editor’s note: On Jan. 3, 2025, WordPress.org staff announced that they were resuming the suspended services. Automattic CEO Matt Mullenweg on Friday announced a shutdown of almost all services on WordPress.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: China protests US sanctions for its alleged role in hacking, complains of foreign hacker attacks
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China has slammed a decision by the U.S. Treasury to sanction a Beijing-based cybersecurity company for its alleged role in multiple hacking incidents targeting critical U.S. infrastructure, while the Chinese cyber security agency complained Monday of attacks on Chinese networks.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: My robot teacher: The challenge of AI in computer science education
item.description: Over the past two years, generative AI has been a force for transformation—and disruption—everywhere it’s landed. Education was no exception; if anything, schools were among the first institutions to grapple with AI’s implications.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: FAA cancels public meeting on SpaceX due to Carter Day of Mourning
item.description: A day of public meetings scheduled in South Texas on SpaceX's Starship launches has been canceled due to National Day of Mourning for former President Jimmy Carter's death.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, NewsNation

item.title: Create custom visuals on your iPhone with Image Playground in iOS 18.2
item.description: Apple's Image Playground transforms text prompts into images or animations in seconds, brining a world of creativity to the palm of your hand.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Police took over a week to name the NYC subway burning victim. A fake name spread in the meantime
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — It took police more than a week to publicly identify Debrina Kawam, 57, as the woman who was fatally set on fire in a New York subway train last month. But on the internet, it took just hours for a false name to begin spreading.
item.dc:creator: MELISSA GOLDIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: The cloud architecture renaissance of 2025
item.description: The perfect storm is coming that will force enterprises to rethink their cloud strategy. Cloud architecture will take center stage during 2025. This isn’t just another hype cycle. First, we need to talk about the elephant in the room: generative AI.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Apple to pay $95 million to settle lawsuit accusing Siri of eavesdropping
item.description: Apple has agreed to pay $95 million to settle a lawsuit accusing the privacy-minded company of deploying its virtual assistant Siri to eavesdrop on people using its iPhone and other trendy devices.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ruby completes switch to Prism parser
item.description: Ruby 3.4.0, and Ruby 3.4.1, updates to the longstanding dynamic, open source programming language, have arrived, with Prism now the default parser. Ruby 3.4.0 was released December 25, Christmas Day, along with an update, Ruby 3.4.1, which merely changed the version number of the release. Ruby 3.4.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AI, power availability and Intel’s future
item.description: As 2025 kicks off, it’s time to dust off the crystal ball. Here are my data center predictions for the coming year. 1) Trump backs off on tech tariffs For all the handwringing, Trump has a history of not following through on his threats.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Confronting the growing drone threat
item.description: There is a solid rationale for prioritizing safe, secure and controlled RF cyber-based counter-UAS technology as decision makers consider future standards. The post Confronting the growing drone threat first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network
